summary: Iter11 full regression PASSED. Backend: 19/19 pytests green across iter9 (7), iter10 (5), iter11 (7) — covers branding/auth/google/template-CRUD/bulk-send-validation/bulk-send-queue/theme-apply-to-admin and prior multitenancy + iter9 customer fixes. Frontend e2e validated: (a) Settings tab order is exactly Company, Branding, SEO & Analytics, Authentication, My Account, Staff, Payroll — Email/SMS/Notifications tabs successfully removed. (b) Branding panel renders 2 Radix sliders ('Header Logo Height', 'Footer Logo Height') + 1 Display Mode dropdown. (c) Authentication tab content references Google. (d) /admin/marketing has horizontal tabs in exact order Campaigns → Email Setup → SMS Setup → Templates → Bulk Send → Logs with all 6 data-testids (mkt-tab-*) present and laid out left-to-right (verified by getBoundingClientRect.left ascending). (e) Templates panel renders with 'New Template' button. (f) Bulk Send panel shows Compose form, Channel=Email, Manual select / Everyone matching filters toggle, District filter, 'Marketing opt-in only' toggle — exactly per spec. (g) Made-with-Emergent badge (#emergent-badge) count = 0 on storefront /, /login, /admin/login, /admin/marketing. (h) Customer /login does NOT show Google button while company.auth_google_enabled is the default false (login-google-btn count=0). (i) /admin/login does NOT show Google button. (j) Storefront homepage loads with brand text 'Vetra Clothing.' at 28px height (no 'Brand.' fallback flicker). Backend tests already cover: GET /api/company exposes auth_google_enabled, auth_google_client_id, header_logo_height, footer_logo_height, logo_display_mode and explicitly does NOT echo auth_google_client_secret; PUT /api/admin/company round-trips and unsets default templates per (event_key, channel); /api/admin/marketing/bulk-send 400s for bad channel and queues 2/2 opted-in customers; /api/theme persists apply_to_admin. No bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 3110+ lines and routes/marketing.py + routes/company.py are growing — the modularisation backlog from iter5/6/7/8/9 is still pending. Consider splitting server.py into routes/* modules following the same pattern as routes/marketing.py and routes/company.py.

Frontend Settings.jsx currently renders all tabs unconditionally except super_admin-only ones. Branding/Authentication tabs correctly gate as required (Authentication only for super_admin per brief). Verified Authentication tab is visible to admin@demo.com which is super_admin.

company GET response intentionally hides auth_google_client_secret (verified by test_google_auth_toggle). Good security practice — keep this pattern when adding future provider secrets (e.g., Stripe secret key) to prevent leakage.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the 16 iter11 frontend assertions explicitly listed in the brief

seed_data_creation: iter11 pytest creates a TEST_iter11 customer pair with marketing_opt_in=true for the bulk-send queue test and a transient NotificationTemplate row that is deleted at the end of the test. iter9/iter10 fixtures unchanged. No persistent test data left behind that would affect storefront UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Storefront uses a single SPAN brand element with default height 28-32px when no logo image is set; the .header_logo_height/.footer_logo_height inline styles are applied by Navbar/Footer components only when a logo URL exists OR via the brand-flash skeleton placeholder. To test logo height applies, PUT /api/admin/company with header_logo_height=56 and a real logo_url, then reload /. The localStorage key for admin auth is NOT 'token' — login appears to use a different mechanism (likely cookie or non-default key); when scripting authenticated frontend flows, prefer the UI login flow (data-testids login-email/login-password/login-submit) rather than presetting localStorage. The Marketing → Bulk Send 'Manual select' tab toggles to a customer checklist; verified via screenshot. Made-with-Emergent badge has been fully removed from index.html (#emergent-badge count is 0 on every route tested).
rca of the issue: No bugs surfaced in this iteration. All three iter brief categories (backend persistence + branding/google fields, marketing-tab restructure with 6 data-testids, badge removal) are working end-to-end. Theme apply_to_admin persistence verified by test_theme_apply_to_admin_persists. Live email/SMS dispatcher correctly falls back to status='mocked' when no integration is configured (orders.py _log_notification → dispatcher.dispatch path) — confirmed by orderly server logs and existing checkout regression.
